summary: Added pointer influence to scene motion: (1) Added pointerX/pointerY to FrameState interface, (2) Added EMA smoothing (0.92 decay) for pointerDisturbance in render loop matching the treble smoothing pattern, (3) Replaced uniform directional push in particleField with normalized radial push from pointer position using inverse-distance-squared influence, (4) Threaded pointer position through FrameState to geometry system, (5) Added 10 tests covering decay behavior, ramp-up, bounds, spatial influence, idle animation, and touch/mouse equivalence.
